title: Session 49: Applications of the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview In this session we see how definite integrals can be used in estimation, to find upper or lower bounds on an answer. Then we examine how the limits on the definite integral interact with substitutions.
